channel.title: Austin Jones on Yakkl
channel.description: Recent content in Austin Jones on Yakkl

item.title: Alpha version of Yakkl
item.description: Yakkl works great but we labeled it as Alpha so no one would expect flawless code. There are a few rough spots but almost all centered around the deployment for those wanting to do development on it or run it in their own data centers. Today, we announce the first Alpha of the open-sourced version of Yakkl which can be found at Yakkl Github Repo. This Alpha release will give you a glimpse into what is coming and it includes not only channels but topics so you do not have to put up with “Channel Sprawl”.

item.title: Join our Slack community
item.description: I know, right? Why do we have a Slack channel? Simple, Slack is a good tool but for large diverse teams it gets a little challenging to administer not to mention “Channel Sprawl”. We have a Slack channel in the unlikely event Yakkl is having an issue and you may want to instant message us. Again, not likely. Want to chat with the Yakkl community about best-practices, features, and more? Join the slack community here (we’ll get back to you ASAP).
